heading: Infrastructure Security Division
label: 654 Infrastructure Security Division
notes: Amendments2021—Subsec. Continuation in Office, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–283, div. H, title XC, § 9001(d)(2)134 Stat. 4767Jan. 1, 2021“The individual serving as the Assistant Director for Infrastructure Security of the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency of the Department of Homeland Security on the day before the date of enactment of this Act [] may serve as the Executive Assistant Director for Infrastructure Security on and after that date without the need for renomination or reappointment.”Jan. 1, 2021

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is established in the Agency an Infrastructure Security Division.

children.label: A
children.text: be at the level of Assistant Secretary within the Department;

children.label: B
children.text: be appointed by the President without the advice and consent of the Senate; and

children.heading: Reference
children.label: 3 Reference
children.text: Any reference to the Assistant Secretary for Infrastructure Protection or Assistant Director for Infrastructure Security in any law, regulation, map, document, record, or other paper of the United States shall be deemed to be a reference to the Executive Assistant Director for Infrastructure Security.
direct the critical infrastructure security efforts of the Agency;

carry out, at the direction of the Director, the Chemical Facilities Anti-Terrorism Standards Program established under subchapter XVI and the secure handling of ammonium nitrate program established under part J of subchapter VIII, or any successor programs;
fully participate in the mechanisms required under ; andsection 652(c)(7) of this title
carry out such other duties and powers as prescribed by the Director.
